description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Notepad Next that runs on push to master and tags, and on pull requests. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build the project on ubuntu-20.04, windows-latest, and macos-latest with different Qt versions and modules. It checks out the repository, installs Qt, and then runs QMake and compilation steps specific to each OS. The workflow also creates a draft GitHub release and uploads the build artifacts to it.
